name: OrienSpace

overview.value: Orienspace Technology (Shandong) Co., Ltd, trading as Orienspace, is a Chinese commercial aerospace enterprise founded on 9 June 2020 and headquartered in Yantai, Shandong. It designs and manufactures the Gravity series of launch vehicles and the Force series of rocket engines. Its solid-fuel Gravity-1 rocket made its maiden flight on 11 January 2024, breaking records as the world's largest solid-fuel carrier rocket and China's most powerful commercial launch vehicle at the time.

focus.value: launch vehicles (Gravity series) and rocket engines (Force series)

notes: Added in the audit Phase 3 backfill (2026-07-08), verify-then-add.
